chapter_title.en: Chapter on Disciplining and Testing a Child

text: 4747 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى قَالَ : "يَشِبُّ اَلصَّبِيُّ كُلَّ سَنَةٍ أَرْبَعَ أَصَابِعَ بِإِصْبَعِ نَفْسِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4747 - In the narration of Hammad ibn Isa, it is reported:
"A child grows every year by four finger-widths, measured by his own finger."
